title: ESP32 Wi-Fi — connected but offline
description: An ESP32-S3 station associates with the AP and logs 'connected', but the first DNS lookup fails. The app starts using the network on WIFI_EVENT_STA_CONNECTED (link up) instead of waiting for IP_EVENT_STA_GOT_IP (address assigned), so it runs before DHCP completes — a classic, subtle ESP-IDF Wi-Fi bug.
bugSummary: The app signals 'network ready' on WIFI_EVENT_STA_CONNECTED (the radio link is up, but there is no IP yet) rather than on IP_EVENT_STA_GOT_IP. check_connectivity() then resolves a hostname before DHCP has assigned an address, so getaddrinfo fails — the device is 'connected' but offline. The IP arrives ~3 s later, after the failure.
honestLabel: Serial logs captured from a real ESP32-S3 (CH343) — a buggy run and a fixed run. SSID sanitized.
